title: La geopolítica y la IA marcan el futuro global
summary: Los expertos abogan por una mayor integración europea que permita al Viejo Continente ganar agilidad y tiempo para competir con EEUU y China por el liderazgo en este nuevo escenario mundial. Leer

title: La trama que implica a Zapatero se extiende a Cataluña: quiso lucrarse con el Hard Rock
summary: El juez detecta que dos de las empresas presuntamente implicadas barajaron una comisión del 3% por intermediar en el desbloqueo del macroproyecto, pero no detecta pagos. Leer

title: La desintegración de la democracia
summary: ¿Qué más se requiere para que cunda, ya para quedarse, el convencimiento de que Sánchez, además de gobernar por decreto con la anti-España y la antimonarquía parlamentaria, se rodea con gente de aparente conducta mafiosa que está bajo sospecha de haber cometido graves delitos? Leer

title: Thousands rally in Madrid demanding PM quit over graft allegations
summary: Thousands of people marched through the streets of Madrid on Saturday calling for Socialist Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez to resign over allegations of corruption within his entourage.

title: Inside Spain: The overlooked fight to prevent another pandemic
summary: In this week’s edition, we explain how Spain is continuously fighting on numerous fronts to prevent diseases passed from animals to humans from spreading and leading to another pandemic, as the world hopes for the hantavirus and Ebola outbreaks to end soon.

title: Galerna: When temperatures plummet by 18C in an hour in northern Spain
summary: A meteorological phenomenon known as 'galernas' on Spain's northern coast means that you could get caught in sudden storms and plummeting temperatures.

title: Spain's mandatory registration of tourist flats rejected by Supreme Court
summary: Spain's Supreme Court on Thursday struck down a national registry for tourist accommodation to combat illegal short-term rentals, ruling that the central government had overstepped its authority into areas controlled by the regions.
